name: Sean Kalra
title: Attending Physician
bio:
A Boulder native, Dr. Kalra earned his medical degree 
from the University of Colorado. He then completed 
residency in internal medicine at Yale New Haven 
Hospital, and fellowship in pulmonary and critical care
 medicine at the Brigham and Women's Hospital in 
Boston. Following fellowship he obtained a Masters of 
Public Health from Harvard while pursuing post-doctoral
 training in bioinformatics at the Channing.
